ogTitle: Sydney Olympic Park vs Sylvania: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sydney Olympic Park and Sylvania.
heading: Sydney Olympic Park vs Sylvania — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sydney Olympic Park, New South Wales and Sylvania, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sydney Olympic Park and Sylvania have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Sydney Olympic Park or Sylvania safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sydney Olympic Park has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Sylvania scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sydney Olympic Park scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Sylvania scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sydney Olympic Park or Sylvania?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sydney Olympic Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
